penalties.description: Maximum time reached before completion. The ligating loop was not secured on the appendage and the tail was not cut inside the trainer.

reasoning: Major disagreement between models on task completion. Claude identified this as an incomplete training video with no actual task completion, while GPT-4o scored it as a completed task with minor positioning error. Given Claude's detailed analysis of instructional content and company branding, and the fundamental requirement that the task must be completed within 180 seconds, the incomplete_task assessment is more defensible.
